mapper.select: select coalesce(spr.use_yn, 'N') as use_yn, coalesce(spr.min_length, 0) as min_length, coalesce(spr.max_length, 0) as max_length, coalesce(spr.min_uppercase, 0) as min_uppercase, coalesce(spr.min_lowercase, 0) as min_lowercase, coalesce(spr.min_number, 0) as min_number, coalesce(spr.min_special, 0) as min_special from sys_plant sp left join sys_password_role spr on spr.link_sys_id = sp.sys_id where 1=1 and sp.plant_cd != 'ADMIN' and sp.use_yn = 'Y' and sp.delete_yn = 'N' and sp.plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd}
select user_password from sys_user su where 1=1 and su.sys_id = #{sysId} and su.delete_yn = 'N' and su.use_yn = 'Y'
